latency.name: Latency
latency.summary: Point write 19.2µs (SimulatedIo), point read 22.1µs. NVM Tier 1 write ~50ns (dc cvap to DRAM). Adaptive config: scan-hot mode 41x range scan improvement (69µs vs 2,825µs). Software prefetch overlaps ~100ns cache miss on tree traversal. Cross-modal onboarding 182µs.

throughput.name: Throughput
throughput.summary: 52,100 write ops/s, 45,200 read ops/s (SimulatedIo). NVM CentralHashBuffer: wait-free concurrent appends via AtomicU64 fetch_add. Per-thread write coalescer: 8-10x fewer CAS ops for hot-key workloads (90% coalesce ratio). Batch write 193,000 ops/s.

concurrency.name: Concurrency
concurrency.summary: Multi-writer MVCC via 64-stripe partitioned locks (PR #247). FNV-1a hash routes to 64 stripes. Writers to different classification-chain partitions proceed concurrently. Reads never block (CoW snapshots). Deadlock-free multi-partition acquisition via sorted lock ordering. ConflictGraph tracks write-set conflicts with cross-partition detection. EpochGuard + EpochTable for safe reclamation. 27 tests across concurrency/tx modules.

queryEfficiency.name: Query Efficiency
queryEfficiency.summary: Cross-modal queries (KV+Graph+GIS+Search) in 182µs vs 5-20ms traditional 3-system stack.

durability.name: Durability
durability.summary: Dual persistence model: WAL (group commit, CoW pages) + NVM three-tier epoch persistence (Tier 1 dc cvap ~50ns, Tier 2 msync ~50µs, Tier 3 F_FULLFSYNC ~15ms). Platform fences: ARM64 dc cvap/dsb inline assembly + x86_64 CLFLUSHOPT/SFENCE. EpochWalWriter eliminates WAL from hot path. 10,000 DST crash sequences + NVM crash recovery tests (214 NVM tests total).

consistency.name: Consistency
consistency.summary: Serializable snapshot isolation (SSI). All reads return consistent committed state.

availability.name: Availability
availability.summary: Raft consensus — 13 modules, 4,896 LOC, 106 tests. Core: leader election, log replication, compaction, persistence. Advanced: self-governing topology (WN-RAFT2-04, auto-demotion/promotion — 8 tests), state-as-intelligence publisher (WN-RAFT2-07, graph-queryable Raft state — 4 tests), entry dedup (WN-RAFT2-02, 3 strategies — 15 tests). Device lifecycle (register/deregister/heartbeat — 22 device tests across 3 modules). Self-draining conflict pipeline (PR #201). Federated mesh: 5-tier DeviceManifest, CBAC-enforced sync, quorum-as-confidence. 10/10 benchmarks green.

faultTolerance.name: Fault Tolerance
faultTolerance.summary: Auto WAL recovery + NVM O(1) superblock recovery (APFS CoW-aware: recover from e-1). Hardware auto-detection: Apple Silicon, Graviton4, x86_64 selects correct fence instructions. CRC32c checksums on pages + HMAC-SHA384 chained WAL (PR #247: per-record provenance, tamper-proof chain). 1,000 WAL + 7 NVM recovery sequences passed. 33 WAL tests total.

horizontalVertical.name: Horizontal vs Vertical Scaling
horizontalVertical.summary: Vertical: single-node B-epsilon tree. Raft consensus: 13 modules, 4,896 LOC, 106 tests. Core + advanced: self-governing topology (WN-RAFT2-04), state publisher (WN-RAFT2-07), entry dedup (WN-RAFT2-02, 3 strategies). Federation: FWGA with 5-tier DeviceManifest, CBAC-enforced sync, quorum-as-confidence. Raft membership changes (joint consensus). Classification-chain partitioning (312 LOC, 5 tests) for governance-aware data locality.

dataFootprint.name: Data Footprint
dataFootprint.summary: WAF 3.04 (constant across configs). Bincode codec 3.3% overhead. Governance 49x cheaper than app-layer.

elasticity.name: Elasticity
elasticity.summary: All 4 dimensions green: online device add (zero-downtime via DeviceManifest), online device remove (deregister_device() + connection graph — 22 device tests across 3 modules), automatic rebalancing (scope-change detection + ScopeChangeDelta triggers sync_with_manifest), progressive compaction (background space reclamation). Read scaling near-flat (20.2-22.5µs for 10x data). 5/5 benchmarks green.

fabricFlight.name: Fabric Flight & Mesh
fabricFlight.summary: Fabric Flight v1.0 (2026-04-03): universal epistemic transport protocol. QUIC-native transport (~25% throughput, 28% p50 latency reduction vs gRPC). io_uring zero-copy (zero heap allocs for 1GB EpistemicBundle). 11-RPC surface, 36-module exchange layer, ~264 tests. Hologram protocol (3-level progressive depth). TCI meta-edge materialization (flush-time implicit→explicit synthesis). 3 transport adapters: BLE (Watch/AirPods), HTTPS, UWB (Vision Pro). Cross-domain confidence translation (Linear/LogisticRemap/DomainTable). GEMVT 0.024% false-positive causal ordering.

accessControl.name: Access Control
accessControl.summary: CBAC 6-state circuit breaker (99 tests) + REWG graph-derived entitlements (27 tests) + EACB/FROST threshold signatures (21 tests). Cryptographic access control via RDKC governance-bound keys (92 tests). 352 adversarial gym functions across 28 files. 15,913 security LOC across 14 modules. Gap: ML-DSA-87 post-quantum signatures, FIPS ACVP.

encryption.name: Encryption
encryption.summary: AES-256-GCM-SIV per-page encryption with governance-bound keys (RDKC). ML-KEM-1024 + X25519 hybrid PQ transport. CNSA 2.0 profiles (130 CAM tests). TEE/HSM/TPM/PUF hardware trust (48 tests). LDP+ORAM+FHE privacy (39 tests). ZK-STARK governance proofs (11 tests). WAL HMAC-SHA384 chain (17 tests). WAF=3.03 zero overhead. 2,407 tests passing. Gap: FIPS 140-3 formal certification.

auditing.name: Auditing
auditing.summary: ProvenanceChain on every entity (zero overhead). TCI flush-time co-occurrence. CBAC state transition audit trail. WAL HMAC-SHA384 chained (PR #247): [0xCB magic][provenance:26B][record:N][hmac_tag:48B], each tag covers prev_tag + WalProvenance (agent_id, clearance, connectivity, timestamp) for non-repudiation per NIST AU-10. RDKC-derived or static key modes. ACVP vectors (RFC 4231). Compliance export (PR #250): ComplianceReport with 7 control attestations (SOX 404, HIPAA 164.312(b)/(c)(1), NIST AU-2/3/10/12). SIEM (PR #250): CEF for ArcSight/Splunk + STIX 2.1 for Sentinel/Elastic, 4 event types. GYM-R01 SSP Evidence Appendix. 42 total tests.

resourceUtilization.name: Resource Utilization
resourceUtilization.summary: B-epsilon tree with adaptive epsilon. NVM two-region mmap (hot/cold) for LPDDR5X PASR bank idling. Adaptive config switching: auto Point-Hot/Scan-Hot based on workload (41x scan improvement). Per-thread write coalescer reduces SoC fabric energy 8-10x. mmap hints: THP for cold region, MADV_RANDOM for hot. Software prefetch on tree traversal. Zone map pruning.

powerConsumption.name: Power Consumption
powerConsumption.summary: 3,000x NVMe storage energy reduction via LPSR preservation (epoch batching keeps NVMe asleep). 9.1x lower CPU power than SQLite. QoS E-core pinning: 79mW vs 5,200mW P-core. BatteryStateMonitor: adaptive Tier 2 intervals (5ms charging, 500ms low battery, disabled in Low Power Mode). Confidence-weighted persistence: speculative data stays in DRAM only. LPDDR5X PASR via hot/cold mmap separation.

tco.name: Total Cost of Ownership
tco.summary: Zero licensing, embedded. Governance 49x cheaper than traditional stack. Graviton ARM64 Fargate: 20% cost reduction + 30% perf improvement (deployed). Windows VirtualLock + NUMA allocation for desktop optimization.

drivers.name: Drivers & ORMs
drivers.summary: 4-language driver coverage: Rust (native), Python PyO3 (LensQuery, ConfidenceEnvelope, TemporalProvenance, GovernanceState — merged PR #231), Swift C-FFI (5 Apple targets — merged PR #148), JavaScript/TypeScript gRPC client (@trustdb/client). Apple deep integration: power-shaped sync, Watch/AirPods delta sync, Vision Pro spatial scoping.

protocol.name: Protocol / API
protocol.summary: Fabric Flight v1.0: 11-RPC QUIC-native protocol (OpenSession, TraverseGraph, PushDeltas, SubscribeBeliefs, SpatialStream, ExchangeAtoms, ResolveVeiled + 4 more). TEP semantic foundation (51 tests). Lens API: composable filters + TraversalPlan. Arrow Flight SQL (feature-gated). 3 transport adapters: BLE, HTTPS, UWB. Differential sync (RFC 6902 JSON Patch + watermark). Belief subscription (WAL-flush-triggered push — gap closed).

tooling.name: Tooling & Observability
tooling.summary: WAT + Prometheus exporter (12 tests). OTel #[instrument] on 5 key store ops. 2 Grafana dashboards (overview + mesh health). DB-Gym (17 workloads). TrustDB Scorecard. Gaps: GUI admin, CLI tool.
